• Procedural mining world with day/night cycle, heat, and customizable textures.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT with host election, chat, trading, and admin tools.
  • Extensive UI: mobile controls, HUD gauges, shop, inventory, warp portals, and settings.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

This HTML page implements a 2‑D mining game called “Mega Miner NG”. The engine generates terrain procedurally, handles player movement, drilling, AOE mining, and explosions, while providing a rich UI for inventory, shop upgrades, chat, and admin controls. Multiplayer is synchronized through MQTT, with host‑election logic and cloud‑save features.
